title: Jupiter Swap Route Finder
description: Query Jupiter's on-chain routing data indexed by GoldRush to find the best swap path for any SPL token pair — returns the expected output amount, minimum output after slippage tolerance, price impact percentage, and the full multi-hop route through intermediate DEXes (Raydium, Orca, Meteora, Lifinity, etc.). Feed this into an agent's trade execution loop: if price impact exceeds your threshold, hold the position; otherwise use the route data to construct and submit the swap transaction.
